Watch movies with subtitles using Open Subtitles MKV Player. It is free and clean, works under Windows.
Get subtitles fast! - VLSub delivers instant captions in VLC from OpenSubtitles.com for your favorite movies & shows
ai.OpenSubtitles.com - generate subtitles for your movie/episode, translate in any language using the latest AI technology
Get Chrome/FireFox browser Open Subtitles extension - add subtitles to any video sites such as Youtube, Netflix, Amazon Prime, HBO, Disney+
Become VIP member - Support us and enjoy site without advertisement
Why use OpenSubtitles.org?

Why use OpenSubtitles.org?

  • - biggest multi-language subtitle database
  • - no registration needed to download subtitles
  • - advanced search filters (by genre, rating, year...)
  • - search for more than one language
  • - search for many subtitles simultaneously (multi-search)
  • - get search results by e-mail or rss
  • - site is "open" (you can get every page as parseable XML)
  • - support for coding web-applications (autodownload, upload)
  • - can act as a subtitle server for other subtitle sites
  • - we look for your feature requests (site still in development)
